name: GiveCare fall check-in voice pack
summary: Trust-building caregiver voice for seasonal planning, support, and next-step clarity.

donts: shame families for being late to plan

examples.label: email opener
examples.text: If fall routines are changing fast, a simple care plan can make the next few weeks feel more manageable.

examples.label: cta
examples.text: Start with one conversation and one shared checklist.

source.notes: Derived from the canonical caregiver persona in cli-prsna.
